arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher has made an interesting prediction about Chelsea
arts.sum: Conor Gallagher is still secretly a blue...

arts.ttl: 'I handed failing ex-Chelsea star a Champion League lifeline and it's paying off'
arts.sum: Aston Villa signed Ross Barkley in the summer as Unai Emery placed his faith in the former Everton and Chelsea midfielder after seeing him perform for Luton Town last season

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host Aston Villa on Sunday afternoon in the Premier League. Preview includes how to watch on TV, team news, predicted lineups and score prediction.

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill backs Enzo Maresca's Chelsea change as he sets sights on Reece James role
arts.sum: Levi Colwill has thrived since Enzo Maresca took over as Chelsea manager and has become a key ally of the Italian, with the England international now looking to take on more responsibility

arts.ttl: Manchester United to battle Chelsea, Juventus for Premier League striker in summer transfer window?
arts.sum: Manchester United will reportedly have to battle Chelsea and Juventus for the signature of Ipswich Town's Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'is dating Joey Essex's ex and Love Island star Grace Rosa Jackson'
arts.sum: Jackson, 25, featured on season 11 of the ITV2 dating show and she very briefly coupled up with Joey Essex. This came after she and Essex had enjoyed a holiday romance in 2023.

arts.ttl: Matty Cash names Aston Villa's 'difference maker' who flies under the radar
arts.sum: Matty Cash has described Boubacar Kamara as a "difference maker" and admits Aston Villa miss him when he's out of the team. Asked how much he has been missed, Cash said: "A lot.

arts.ttl: Sarri admits to ‘mistake’ leaving Chelsea for Juventus return
arts.sum: Maurizio Sarri admits ‘it was a mistake’ to push for the Chelsea exit and come...

arts.ttl: Euro giants join Chelsea in Liam Delap chase as Ipswich boss addresses transfer clause
arts.sum: Interest in Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap is now beginning to intensify following his fine start to the Premier League season with the ex-Manchester City starlet being tracked by the likes of Chelsea and Manchester United, respectively

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Arsenal Want to Sign ‘Very Exciting’ £30m Star
arts.sum: Lyon may be forced to part ways with their talented winger, due to their dire financial situation.
